publications.title: Optimizing Deployment Strategies in Autonomous Platforms
publications.abstract: Investigation into deployment strategy performance across the Ooplix platform.

sections.heading: Abstract
sections.content: Investigation into deployment strategy performance across the Ooplix platform.

sections.heading: Methodology
sections.content: 16-step autonomous research pipeline: Observe → Identify → Research → Benchmark → Hypothesize → Experiment → Validate → Publish.

sections.heading: Findings
sections.content: Experiment "Deployment Strategy A/B Test (replay)": treatment did not improve over control (confidence=0.85). Benchmark Deployment Strategy: {"deploy_success_rate":0.897,"rollback_rate":0.82,"time_to_deploy_ms":0.79}. Improvement detected. Experiment "Blue/Green vs Rolling Comparison": treatment did not improve over control (confidence=0.89). Blue/green did not outperform rolling deployment. Benchmark Deployment Strategy: {"deploy_success_rate":0.825,"rollback_rate":0.93,"time_to_deploy_ms":0.835}. No significant improvement.

sections.heading: Experiments
sections.content: No experiments executed in this research cycle.

sections.heading: Recommendations
sections.content: Based on 16 findings in deployment_strategy: consider targeted improvements to increase reliability and reduce latency. Investigate further Investigate further

sections.heading: Conclusion
sections.content: Research cycle complete. 5 findings indexed. 0 experiments run.

publications.title: Workspace Mesh Reliability Research

sections.heading: Methodology
sections.content: 16-step autonomous research pipeline: Observe → Identify → Research → Benchmark → Hypothesize → Experiment → Validate → Publish.

sections.heading: Findings
sections.content: Mesh P90 latency: 180ms Recovery rate: 94% Performance analysis of workspace_mesh shows consistent behavior within expected bounds. Benchmark Workspace Mesh: {"dispatch_latency":57,"sync_accuracy":0.93,"recovery_rate":0.915,"workspace_coverage":12}. No significant improvement. Benchmark Workspace Mesh: {"dispatch_latency":144.5,"sync_accuracy":0.925,"recovery_rate":0.955,"workspace_coverage":12}. No significant improvement. Benchmark Workspace Mesh: {"dispatch_latency":169,"sync_accuracy":0.945,"recovery_rate":0.9,"workspace_coverage":12}. No significant improvement. Workspace mesh P90 latency reduced by 18% after coordinator optimization.

publications.title: Deployment Strategy Comparison
publications.abstract: A/B comparison of blue/green vs rolling deployment.

sections.heading: Abstract
sections.content: A/B comparison of blue/green vs rolling deployment.

sections.heading: Methodology
sections.content: 16-step autonomous research pipeline: Observe → Identify → Research → Benchmark → Hypothesize → Experiment → Validate → Publish.

sections.heading: Findings
sections.content: Benchmark Deployment Strategy: {"deploy_success_rate":0.877,"rollback_rate":0.817,"time_to_deploy_ms":0.85}. Improvement detected. Experiment "Deployment Strategy A/B Test (replay)": treatment did not improve over control (confidence=0.83). Benchmark Deployment Strategy: {"deploy_success_rate":0.82,"rollback_rate":0.92,"time_to_deploy_ms":0.893}. No significant improvement. Experiment "Blue/Green vs Rolling Comparison": treatment improved over control (confidence=0.86). Blue/green outperformed rolling deployment.

sections.heading: Recommendations
sections.content: Based on 31 findings in deployment_strategy: consider targeted improvements to increase reliability and reduce latency. Investigate further Investigate further

sections.heading: Conclusion
sections.content: Research cycle complete. 5 findings indexed. 1 experiments run.

findings: Experiment "Deployment Strategy A/B Test (replay)": treatment did not improve over control (confidence=0.83).
Benchmark Deployment Strategy: {"deploy_success_rate":0.82,"rollback_rate":0.92,"time_to_deploy_ms":0.893}. No significant improvement.
Experiment "Blue/Green vs Rolling Comparison": treatment improved over control (confidence=0.86).
